metadata.description: Local address hierarchy stored in JSON for cascading dropdowns: Province, District, Municipality or Rural Municipality, Ward, Tole or Area, and House or Building.
metadata.dataScope: This local JSON includes all 7 provinces, all 77 districts, all 753 local levels, and ward lists for each local level. National tole or area and house or building lists are not included in the source datasets used here, so those arrays are empty.
metadata.wardLevelNote: Tole or area and house or building names usually come from municipality-level or ward-level records, not from a single clean national dataset.
